enriched_points.expanded_content: Research on hybrid energy systems aims to integrate multiple energy sources, enhancing efficiency and reliability in energy harvesting applications, as highlighted in recent studies.
Investigating innovative materials can lead to improved energy conversion efficiencies and functionalities in energy harvesting devices, driving advancements in sustainable technologies.
Conducting long-term stability analyses ensures the durability and performance consistency of energy harvesting systems under varied environmental conditions.
